compiled_state.title: [ticket-transition]: closing tickets without explicit timeout -> exit 144 (SIGURG)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Observed during retro session 2026-04-16: closing tickets via .claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <id> open closed intermittently exits with code 144 (SIGURG tool timeout). First attempt on 6a5e-0179 timed out 3 times before succeeding. Subsequent closes of 27b5-fb46, 3d16-3dc3, and caa7-3a19 succeeded on first attempt with timeout: 600000. Without explicit timeout, the default ~73s ceiling appears insufficient for ticket transition operations that include event compaction. Workaround: set timeout: 600000 on all ticket transition Bash calls.
